test.create_query: CREATE TABLE t (f64 Float64, f32 Float32, u32 UInt32, i64 Int64, d32 Decimal32(3), d64 Decimal64(4), d128 Decimal128(5)) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO t SELECT number, number, number, number, number % 1000000, number, number FROM numbers_mt(100000000) SETTINGS max_threads = 2
INSERT INTO t SELECT number, number, number, number, number % 1000000, number, number FROM numbers_mt(100000000, 100000000) SETTINGS max_threads = 2
INSERT INTO t SELECT number, number, number, number, number % 1000000, number, number FROM numbers_mt(200000000, 100000000) SETTINGS max_threads = 2
test.query: SELECT varPop(f64), varSamp(f64), stddevPop(f64) FROM t
SELECT varPop(f32), varSamp(f32), stddevPop(f32) FROM t
SELECT varPop(d32), varSamp(d32), stddevPop(d32) FROM t
SELECT varPop(d64), varSamp(d64), stddevPop(d64) FROM t
SELECT varPop(d128), varSamp(d128), stddevPop(d128) FROM t
